entry.summary:
Author: WildLadyBug11

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 994Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: After a failed portal attempt by tim he finds himself in paris he meets marinette his brothers finance (but he doesn't know that yet).

entry.title: I Got Isekai’d Into Miraculous—Now They Want Me to Break the Love-Square?! Tch. I’m a Robin. I’ll Fix It My Way.
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 168,124Chapters: 67/?Kudos: 542

Summary: Five years Damian waited for the last Miraculous Ladybug manga, and the ending sucks. Enraged, he boasted he could write a better story. A mischievous, fifth-dimensional imp quickly appears and gives him a chance to prove his claim. To prevent a disappointing ending, he must change the plot as he sees fit. What would a genius detective, Robin, do in the MLB Universe, to cause Chaos of course! ​He wakes up in a world where he is dead, but Alfred is his living ally. With just seven days until the plot kicks off, Damian dedicates himself to healing the fractured Batfamily, slowly putting the pieces back together. But he can multitask. To prevent the Love Square, he decides to aggressively befriend Marinette Dupain-Cheng the only way a Wayne knows how: by replacing her friends with competent ones and burying her under a mountain of gifts. Who knew purchasing platonic affection required so much cashmere?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The City That Smiled Anyway
entry.summary:
Author: Sleeps4theweak_niah

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,459Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 275

Summary: Paris remembers every akuma attack.They remember the fear, the destruction, and the people lost before Ladybug always put everything back together. They remember smiling the next morning because life did not stop just because they were terrified.When Hawkmoth is finally defeated, the truth about Paris reaches the rest of the world.Adrien learns who his father really was.Then he leaves.Marinette stays long enough to realize that winning did not give her anything back.Burned out, grieving, and no longer sure who Marinette Dupain-Cheng is without a mask, she accepts a Wayne Foundation program in Gotham to start over somewhere no one needs Ladybug.Unfortunately, Gotham comes with its own problems.One of them is Damian Wayne.

entry.title: Academic Misconduct
entry.summary:
Author: NeZepellini

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,844Chapters: 11/35Kudos: 82

Summary: Life is not going as planned for Marinette Dupain-Chang. When she was 14, she'd honestly thought that by now she'd be a famous fashion designer and she'd be living out the rest of her life with Adrien in all her hamster-loving glory. At 25, all she wants to do is get her MBA and launch MDC to new heights. No romance, unnecessary rivals, or convoluted plans. When life just seems to get in the way, she isn't sure what to do. Or, where Marinette fake-dates Damian, someone she cannot stand for the life of her, until it doesn't feel like fake-dating anymore.This is my take on a character study. I just want to warn people that Marinette isn't a good person, far from it. She is flawed, she does a lot of shitty things, but there are consequences. Overall, this fic focuses on her personality traits and exaggerates them slightly to show really how they impact her life. I want to apologise for any butchering of the characters I may do (It's not an excuse), but I do have reasons for doing so. Updates on the first of every month (for now, update rate may increase as time goes on.)

entry.title: Lie Lie Lie
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 310,721Chapters: 102/110Kudos: 1,413

Summary: Marinette Dupain-Cheng had a grand falling out with Adrien. He had learned the truth, that his father was Hawk Moth and his girlfriend had kept this secret. Chrysalis was dead,her life was spiraling out of despair. Her Maman let her leave with her Uncle Wang, but not to Shanghai. Hey, there is another restaurant opening in Gotham, and Uncle Wang needed a helper. Goodbye, City of Love, and welcome, Capital City of Crime. __________________________________________________________________ Damian Wayne does not get “dumped”. However, given the Wayne Gala is close and his brothers plan to make fun of his being alone, Damian needs a plan of action: a pretend girlfriend. The target? His friend, Maps Mizoguchi. Approaching the raven-haired under the tree, he gives the order for a romantic alliance. But when the girl turns around, it’s not Maps. It’s a confused French transfer student holding a macaron. A lesser man would apologize for the mistake. Damian Wayne? He doubles down. She has the right hair. She is a variable he can control. “You,” he decides, refusing to admit error. “You are an acceptable substitute. Don’t be late.”

entry.title: The After Effects of An Akuma (2.0)
entry.summary:
Author: Fateofwar

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,931Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 64

Summary: (I am back) The idea for this work goes to Lilavaporizer9000, some part might be similar. I have little knowing of The DC world as compared to the Heralds and enforcers reading this fanfic. Some characters might be ooc, and if you find any case do tell. And English is not my first language, so any mistake or error is purely due to intervention of the keyboard and my spite for the language if I have any. (sounds familiar)   So, Damian Wayne needs a girlfriend. His family won't stop pestering him with a normal teen life, not after he told them it would be better to spend 24 hours in the asylum rather than in this place where everyone seems to be losing their brain cells. A normal girlfriend would shut them better than anything. Which proved more difficult than solving criminal cases and fighting a Superman with a kryptonite dagger. The second option is find a small group of humans to meet his needs. Which seems impossible considering his general distain for them, as Dick calls it. He is one for sure. Luckily there is a match. Marinette Dupin-Cheng. She’s intelligent, quiet, respectful of his boundaries— generally acceptable

entry.title: Can I Be Selfish for Once
entry.summary:
Author: SquigglySquid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,719Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 910

Summary: Marinette's life is crumbling, she lost all her friends to a Pathological liar, her parents are starting to believe a random girl over their daughter, and on top of that Chat Noir is more focused on flirting than, well, saving the god damn city! So what happens when she gains a new friend, wins a trip to Gotham for her class, and, wait, who is that cute grumpy boy? Find out on the next episode of "How da Fuck do you write a story?" with me as your host!

entry.title: Miraculous: A Tale of Ladybug and Catman
entry.summary:
Author: Eloisa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,160Chapters: 6/15Kudos: 136

Summary: Damian Wayne's life is going well. He has his vigilante work in Gotham. He has a career plan. He even has a girlfriend, though if his brothers could tolerate her better, he'd feel less inclined to take a blade to them. But when a supervillain attacks a concert he, his girlfriend Marinette and almost all his family are attending, he - and the rest of the Batfamily - are forced to take drastic measures to counteract the threat.If only he knew where Marinette had gone to hide and why that foreign hero Ladybug looks so annoyingly familiar.Inspired by / an entirely unauthorised sequel to The Great IKEA Game by IcedAquarius.

entry.title: Hello, Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: BookofSunshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,381Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 227

Summary: Guardian Marinette Dupain-Cheng moves to Gotham to combat the imbalance plaguing the city. Hopefully, she'll manage to stay under Batman's radar. (Nobody said anything about the rest of the Batfamily though...)

entry.title: Anthems for a 17 year old girl
entry.summary:
Author: Romain_lettvce

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,143Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 38

Summary: Forced into a role she never asked for at eleven, Ladybug is Paris's last line of defense against a reality-warping terrorist. By day, Marinette Dupain-Cheng is just another girl, trying to survive a school life poisoned by Lila Rossi's lies and her own parents' doubt. Her only escape is the formal, stoic emails from her American pen pal, Damian Wayne. As their digital friendship blossoms into something more, the horrors of Paris bleed through the screen, and a world away, a certain vigilante begins to connect the dots. A story about finding love in the most unlikely of places, when you're too busy saving the world to save yourself.

entry.title: Gotham's Guardian
entry.summary:
Author: justalilyandajane

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,668Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 87

Summary: Marinette Dupain-Cheng wakes up in a Lazarus Pit... with no memory of her former life, superhero alter ego, or even her own name. But what she does have is this magical, glowing knife, so there's that at least. How will a nameless girl learn to navigate Gotham and its vigilantes, while discovering secrets about herself and the magic she was bestowed with? Especially when a certain Robin takes a particular interest in her?

entry.title: Angel In The Dark
entry.summary:
Author: RoseShower

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,247Chapters: 5/20Kudos: 845

Summary: Damian al Ghul intends to make a wife out of the mysterious, french woman that fell from the sky. Marinette just wants to go home. In an alternate dimension where Talia never shipped her son off to join his father, Damian al Ghul becomes the next Demon Head following his grandfather's passing. He rules as he's been taught since birth, disregarding the ominous prophecies about his fated-to-be uttered between the breaths of the League until a beautiful woman falls into his arms unannounced.Meanwhile, a teleportation mishap while using Kaalki lands Marinette in an alternate dimension, one where she is apparently the soulmate of a man who could use some good social manners.

entry.title: the adventures of the Dupain-Cheng Wayne accidentally creating another life
entry.summary:
Author: hyun_xxe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,285Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 474

Summary: It was just a one night stand that didn’t mean anything whatsoever…. until the pregnancy test showed two pink lines a week later, Marinette realized that luck wasn’t on her side. What will Damian the ignorant douche do once he finds out that he is the father?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Bandaids don't fix bulletholes.
entry.summary:
Author: MioShiTomioka

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,970Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 218

Summary: Growing up in a home without anyone there to support you isn’t easy. She had to learn that the hard way, however being sent to the most dangerous city in the world to attend the academy there was a new low even for her family. It was like they wanted her to get killed by someone like the joker!   Comment moderation on to stop bots

entry.title: Wrong Number
entry.summary:
Author: Butterflykingdom33

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,847Chapters: 30/30Kudos: 455

Summary: It was just any other day but was it really, Gina Dupain was meeting an old friend at Wayne manor and that old friend happened to be Bruce Wayne. The two had noticed their child or grandchild's lonely life with barely any friends.The two had a scheme ready to begin and with the help of Alfred who had agreed that both Marinette Dupain Cheng and Damian Wayne could use a friend in their lives to bring some interest and mystery into each other's lives.After all, they were two different people behind the screen that were given the wrong number. So would one wrong number lead to the start of a new friendship or just one short conversation?

entry.title: Soul Bond
entry.summary:
Author: leaping_lizard_babe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,739Chapters: 3/35Kudos: 85

Summary: Before you meet your soulmate, you get brief flashes of their life through the senses – feeling what they run their hands across, seeing the things they see. Marinette, just like anyone else, has a soulmate. But she doesn’t talk about her soulmate because the flashes that she gets of their senses are not good things, in fact, they are very bad things. But one day, the flashes of senses stop, instead someone else’s emotions course through her – the second stage of her soul bond unlocked, but she doesn’t remember meeting her soulmate. Eventually she moves on with the new normal, feeling her soulmates emotions, hoping that one day they can be reunited. But, one day, overwhelming fear and sadness courses through her veins followed by an agonizing pain crushing through her abdomen. And she just knows, her soulmate has died. She has to adjust to a new type of normal, and all too soon, she is thrust into being a superhero.A few months into her time as Ladybug, her soulmate bond restarts as she is flying through the Parisian sky. Suddenly she’s seeing flashes of a dark skyline and feeling someone’s nose crunch under her fist.Will the Paris Bug and the Gotham Bird be able to find each other again?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne

entry.title: Smiling Through
entry.summary:
Author: AKP31E

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,882Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 154

Summary: Damian Wayne doesn’t always get to do what he wants. Sometimes he simply has to smile through the unpleasant things, and sometimes the things that start out unpleasant turn out to be the best things in the end. Meeting Marinette occurred during one of those unpleasant things, and he thinks that if he can convince her to stay by his side that all the other unpleasant things he has to do would be much better, and he wouldn’t have to work quite so hard to smile through.

entry.title: My Shadow
entry.summary:
Author: Intercoursefluids

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,410Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 1,958

Summary: When Marinette was a little girl, she had a friend. He never spoke, never told her his name or anything of the sort, but he was he best friend reguardless. He always followed her everywhere, people would sometimes forget he was even there because of how silent he was. Everyone called him her shadow, matching her move for move, going where she went without a word. It was a fitting name.Shadow disappeared when Marinette turned 8, he only came back 3 years later when she was 11. He came back different, changed in ways she couldn't explain.Now, at 18 years old, Marinette needs his help. Will he answer her call?
